\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}

\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n\\Delta_{\\pi} := \\left| \\frac{S_\\text{out}}{S_\\text{in}} - \\pi \\right| \\leq \\epsilon\n\\]
